title_tag: Surf Camp Senegal | Ngor Surfcamp Teranga
meta_description: Stay, surf and explore at Ngor Surfcamp Teranga in Senegal. Surf camp accommodation near Dakar with easy access to Ngor Island waves.
h1: Surf Camp in Senegal at Ngor Surfcamp Teranga
hero_subtitle: Experience relaxed island life, warm Senegalese hospitality and easy access to some of Dakar’s best surf spots.
intro: Welcome to Ngor Surfcamp Teranga, a surf camp in Senegal designed for travelers who want comfort, good vibes and unforgettable days in the water. Located near Dakar and the waves of Ngor Island, our camp combines accommodation, surf access and a friendly atmosphere for surfers, couples, families and groups looking to discover Senegal’s coastline.

sections.content: Senegal is one of West Africa’s most exciting surf destinations, with warm water, consistent swells and a unique mix of culture, sunshine and laid-back coastal life. Staying at Ngor Surfcamp Teranga puts you close to the famous breaks around Ngor and Dakar, making it easy to enjoy sessions for different levels while experiencing the energy of the local surf scene.
bullets: Surf camp accommodation in Senegal near Dakar
Easy access to the waves around Ngor Island

sections.h2: A Relaxed Stay with Teranga Hospitality
sections.content: At Ngor Surfcamp Teranga, the atmosphere is just as important as the surf. The camp is built around comfort, simplicity and the spirit of teranga, the warm Senegalese tradition of hospitality, so you can settle in, meet other travelers and enjoy a welcoming home base between surf sessions and island adventures.
bullets: Friendly and welcoming surf camp atmosphere
Ideal for surfers, couples, families and groups

sections.h2: The Perfect Base Near Dakar and Ngor
sections.content: Our location makes it easy to combine surfing, отдых and discovery. Close to Dakar and the beaches of Ngor, the camp offers a practical and enjoyable base for exploring the area, catching waves and experiencing local life without being far from the city’s connections, restaurants and culture.
bullets: Close to Ngor beaches and island surf spots

sections.content: A stay at Ngor Surfcamp Teranga is about more than just chasing waves. It is a chance to slow down, enjoy ocean views, discover Senegalese culture and share memorable moments in a beautiful coastal setting where every day can bring a surf session, a boat ride or a sunset by the sea.
bullets: A mix of surfing, relaxation and local culture

cta_heading: Plan Your Senegal Surf Camp Escape
cta_text: Ready to surf, stay and experience the spirit of teranga? Contact Ngor Surfcamp Teranga to plan your trip and book your stay in Senegal.
og_title: Ngor Surfcamp Teranga | Surf Camp in Senegal
og_description: Discover a welcoming surf camp in Senegal near Dakar and Ngor Island. Stay close to the waves and enjoy authentic Senegalese hospitality.
